summary: Comprehensive testing of Bloom app new features: admin panel tabs (Reviews, Services), password reset flow, ResetPasswordPage, and profile avatar upload. All 23 backend tests passed. All frontend flows verified. Fixed critical missing axios import in ProfilePage.js.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/reset-password-request returns success message (existing + non-existent email)
Backend: POST /api/auth/reset-password with bad token returns 400 error
Backend: GET /api/admin/reviews works for admin, returns reviews with specialist_name
Backend: DELETE /api/admin/reviews/{id} returns 404 for non-existent review
Backend: GET /api/admin/services works for admin, returns all services
Backend: DELETE /api/specialists/{id} full lifecycle (create → delete → verify 404)
Backend: POST /api/users/me/upload-avatar accepts multipart image, returns URL
Backend: POST /api/users/me/upload-avatar rejects non-image files with 400
Backend: POST /api/users/me/upload-avatar rejects unauthorized requests
Backend: Admin news CRUD (create + delete with verification)
Backend: GET /api/admin/users returns all users for admin
Backend: POST /api/admin/set-role with invalid role correctly rejected
Frontend: Admin page loads with 5 tabs (Uživatelé, Aktuality, Odborníci, Recenze, Nabídky)
Frontend: Admin Users tab - search input works, role select dropdowns visible for all users
Frontend: Admin News tab - create news form (title, content, category) works, 'Aktualita přidána!' toast
Frontend: Admin News tab - delete button visible with data-testid for each news item
Frontend: Admin Specialists tab - add specialist form with all required fields works, 'Odborník přidán!' toast
Frontend: Admin Specialists tab - delete button with data-testid visible
Frontend: Admin Reviews tab (new) - loads on tab click, shows empty state 'Žádné recenze k moderaci.'
Frontend: Admin Services tab (new) - loads on tab click, shows 4 services with delete buttons
Frontend: Forgot password flow - 'Zapomněli jste heslo?' link visible, form shows 'Obnovení hesla', success message shown after submit
Frontend: /reset-password?token=xxx - PUBLIC route renders correctly (no auth redirect)
Frontend: ResetPasswordPage - form fields (new-password-input, confirm-password-input, reset-submit-btn) present
Frontend: ResetPasswordPage - bad token shows error toast 'Neplatný nebo expirovaný odkaz pro obnovení hesla.'
Frontend: Profile avatar upload - 'Nahrát foto' button works, uploads to server, shows 'Fotografie nahrána!' toast
Frontend: Profile custom avatar thumbnail shown after upload next to Nahrát foto button

bug_fixed.issue: Missing 'import axios from 'axios'' - handleFileChange function used axios without importing it
bug_fixed.severity: CRITICAL - avatar upload would fail with ReferenceError: axios is not defined

critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 1118 lines - consider splitting into separate routers (auth.py, admin.py, specialists.py etc.) for maintainability
logger variable defined at line 1113 but used in function body at line 463 - works at runtime but recommend moving logger initialization to the top of the file
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up test news item and test specialist via admin UI during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working. Fixed critical bug: ProfilePage.js missing axios import. New endpoints tested: /api/auth/reset-password-request, /api/auth/reset-password, /api/admin/reviews, /api/admin/services, DELETE /api/specialists/{id}, POST /api/users/me/upload-avatar. Admin tabs Reviews and Services are lazy-loaded (fetchReviews/fetchServices called on tab click). /reset-password is a PUBLIC route. Avatar uploads go to /app/backend/uploads/avatars/ directory and return a URL. Resend email is live but only verified emails receive actual emails in test mode (success message always returns regardless).
